rationale: Sharing test infrastructure between sync and reactive streams; internal refactor, no spec behavior.
Removing Android Java 8 workarounds; internal cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Logic error in async server selection timing; performance/timing bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Async change stream cursor not guarding against double-close; implementation bug, no spec rule violated.
CI/test task configuration change to make tckTest opt-in; build infrastructure, no spec behavior.
Removing -Xlint:-deprecation compiler flag; build cleanup, no spec behavior.
Removing deprecated API elements; internal cleanup for 4.0, no spec behavior change.
Removing deprecated GridFS async API; internal cleanup for 4.0, no spec behavior change.
Removing deprecated async package elements; internal cleanup for 4.0, no spec behavior change.
Stop publishing mongodb-driver-async artifact; build/packaging change, no spec behavior.
Porting callback-based examples to reactive streams; documentation/example migration, no spec behavior.
Removing flaky test due to test isolation issue; CI/test maintenance, no spec behavior.
ClassCastException when casting Bson to BsonValue in findOneAndUpdate pipeline; Java type system bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Removing CLIRR binary compatibility reports from build; build tooling cleanup, no spec behavior.
Wrapping reactive streams driver; internal refactor for 4.0, no spec behavior mentioned.
Moving Scala driver source into Java project; build/repo restructuring, no spec behavior.
Moving Scala examples into Java repo; documentation/example migration, no spec behavior.
API signature mismatch between sync and async MongoCollection for aggregate/mapReduce; internal API consistency fix, not a spec rule.
NoSuchMethodError from Spring Boot + MongoDB driver version conflict; dependency/classpath issue, no spec behavior.
NoSuchMethodError from driver version downgrade; dependency/classpath issue, no spec behavior.
CSFLE createKey produces garbled creationDate/updateDate (year ~20404); BSON date encoding bug violating CSFLE key document spec.
ChangeStreamBatchCursor#close not idempotent; implementation bug, no spec rule requiring idempotent close violated.
Javadoc URL fetch warning in CI; build/documentation tooling issue, no spec behavior.
Updating sharded transaction tests to avoid readConcern snapshot per DRIVERS-735; test infrastructure update.
Adding spec test coverage for client-side errors in transactions per DRIVERS-672/SPEC-1195; test infrastructure update.
Adding wildcard type support to PojoCodec; Java-specific codec enhancement, no spec behavior.
Connection failure during cursor iteration silently swallows error in reactive streams; async error propagation bug, no specific spec rule cited.
Adding missing tests for aggregation pipeline in bulk write updates per DRIVERS-744; Issue split child ticket.
Making ClassModel immutable by returning defensive copies; Java internal API bug, no spec behavior.
Deprecating DBCursor.explain as not part of CRUD API; API deprecation, no spec nonconformance.
Removing wait queue size limitation per CMAP spec recommendation; spec says deprecated, driver aligning but issuetype is Improvement not a violation.
Fixing deprecation warnings from removed connection pool event class imports; build cleanup.
CMAP spec defines 'connectionError' as valid reason for ConnectionCheckOutFailedEvent; driver was missing this required value.
Deprecating wait queue events/properties per CMAP spec recommendation; proactive spec alignment, not a prior violation.
DRIVERS-753 specifies auth allowed to all server types except arbiters; driver was not implementing this rule.
Client-side encryption specification changes per DRIVERS-698; implementing updated spec requirements.
Updating 'connections survive primary stepdown' tests per DRIVERS-749 to always assert successful insert.
NullPointerException in ServerSessionPool.close due to concurrency issue; implementation bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Feature request: custom POJO field serialization order for human readability; ergonomics, no spec behavior.
Updating client metadata driver name strings for 4.x restructure; internal naming, no spec rule contradicted.
Prefixing internal async interfaces with 'Async' to avoid IDE confusion; internal refactor, no spec behavior.
Deprecating embedded driver as MongoDB drops embedded support; product deprecation, no spec behavior.
Porting callback-based async reference docs to reactive streams; documentation migration, no spec behavior.
Moving Scala reference documentation to Java driver repo; documentation/repo restructuring, no spec behavior.
Feature request to change Publisher<Success> to Publisher<Void> for idiomatic Reactive Streams API; ergonomics, no spec behavior.
Removing unnecessary Observable wrapping of Publishers; internal refactor for 4.0, no spec behavior.
Removing embedded driver for 4.0; product removal, no spec behavior.
Adding documentation section on forcing TLS 1.2; documentation improvement, no spec behavior.
Deprecating public SessionContext interface for internalization in 4.0; API cleanup, no spec nonconformance.
Removing undocumented Java system property defaults replaced by client settings; internal cleanup, no spec behavior.
